{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324015745B005CF0DBBD42DBD28DB"}"},"total":6316},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7234500850252251944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很棒的一本书，各种设定，各种想法，很多地方都很新颖，让人有一探究竟的欲望。稍微有点瑕疵的地方就是留下的铺垫太长了，看到后面的时候前面做的铺垫被淡忘了，会降低阅读感。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1684413548,"group_id":"7085660646888442916","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/NvL6SyFDHLWnyVBxIB5WlZB5F3lzpW8nenVkWpP37a","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4032655615068108","user_name":"爱疯狗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4032655615068108","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7085660646888442916","book_info":{"abstract":"五十年前，鬼星出现，带来了异世界网游《天职》，人类可以从散落在地球各处的五百个登录门进入鬼星，探索终极职业，超凡入圣。
鬼星也带来了兽神降临，末世之灾！
兽神崛起，城市毁灭，人类苟延残喘。
天平的一侧是进化，天平的另一侧是毁灭，人类的进化速度能否超越毁灭的速度？！
主角江铠低价购入残缺材料，千辛万苦成为了非战斗职业“赌徒”。
运由天生，命由我主，一线之机，与天一搏！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6ab944a64a95a419f7e11f307b1c23ef","author":"命给你行不行","author_id":"","book_id":"7085660646888442916","book_name":"网游之命轮之主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7085977896736522783","read_count":"24425","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2903852"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"1200","tags":"游戏体育,末世,网游,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/10f7f215215e33acc596ff52074c519e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779472665&x-signature=83SEltBX%2Br%2FVur%2B5SwT3OMLMZE8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.27565768e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324015745B005CF0DBBD42DBD28DB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读63小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":129,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":227693,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":13089},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7385206901624
